## Summary

Describe the behavior or documentation change.

## Why this matters

Explain the maintenance problem this solves.

## Evaluation

- [ ] Updated or added eval cases
- [ ] Checked relevant manual eval path
- [ ] Not applicable because this is documentation-only

## Safety and memory

- [ ] No private user data was added
- [ ] Memory behavior remains explicit and opt-in
- [ ] Advice boundaries remain clear

## Checklist

- [ ] README/docs updated if needed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] The change keeps `clinic` distinct from a generic assistant
